title: Hardhat Workspace Setup for Solidity Smart Contracts
description: Initialize and fully configure the Hardhat development environment in /contracts. Configure compiler, network settings (local devnet + Sepolia testnet), deployment tooling, ABI artifact export for Python/TypeScript consumers, and integrated test framework. This task produces no contract logic — it only establishes the developer toolchain.
objectives: Single workspace for all sentinel platform smart contracts
Reproducible compilation with fixed Solidity compiler version
Sepolia testnet deploy capability via environment-injected private key
Exported ABI + address JSON artifacts consumed by Python web3.py client

steps: Step 1 - Initialize Package: cd /contracts && npm init -y. Install: npm install --save-dev hardhat@2.22.x @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox@5.x @openzeppelin/contracts@5.x ts-node typescript@5.x dotenv. Init Hardhat with TypeScript: npx hardhat init → select 'Create a TypeScript project'.

Step 2 - hardhat.config.ts: Import HardhatUserConfig from hardhat/config. Solidity: version '0.8.25', optimizer enabled (200 runs). Networks: hardhat (default, chainId 31337), localhost (url: http://127.0.0.1:8545, chainId 31337), sepolia (url: process.env.SEPOLIA_RPC_URL, accounts: [process.env.DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY], chainId 11155111). gasReporter: enabled: true. paths: artifacts ./artifacts, cache ./cache, deployments: NOT here — use separate deploy script.
Step 3 - tsconfig.json: target ES2020, module commonjs, strict true, esModuleInterop true, include contracts/** test/** scripts/**.

Step 4 - Solidity Directory Structure: contracts/ → Registries/ (IssuerRegistry.sol, TrustPolicyRegistry.sol, StatusRegistry.sol, ServiceRegistry.sol), interfaces/ (IIssuerRegistry.sol, etc.), libraries/ (DIDUtils.sol, BytesUtils.sol), errors/ (SentinelErrors.sol — custom error definitions). All contracts start with same pragma and license header.
Step 5 - Standard Contract Header: // SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT. pragma solidity ^0.8.25;. All contracts import from @openzeppelin/contracts/.

Step 6 - Deployment Scripts (scripts/deploy/): deploy-local.ts — deploys all 4 registry contracts to localhost, saves addresses to contracts/deployments/local.json. deploy-sepolia.ts — deploys to Sepolia, saves to contracts/deployments/sepolia.json. Deployment JSON format: {network, chainId, deployedAt, deployer, contracts: {Name: {address, deployedBlock, txHash}}}.

Step 7 - ABI Export (scripts/export-abis.ts): After compilation, copy ABI JSON from artifacts/contracts/**/*.json to contracts/abis/{ContractName}.abi.json. These are committed and consumed by Python web3.py client (TASK-020). Python client never reads from artifacts/ directly.

Step 8 - Makefile targets: compile (npx hardhat compile), test (npx hardhat test --network hardhat), deploy-local (npx hardhat run scripts/deploy/deploy-local.ts --network localhost), deploy-sepolia (npx hardhat run scripts/deploy/deploy-sepolia.ts --network sepolia), export-abis (ts-node scripts/export-abis.ts), lint-sol (npx solhint 'contracts/**/*.sol').

Step 9 - Solhint Configuration (.solhint.json): extends: solhint:default. Rules: avoid-call-value, no-complex-fallback, no-inline-assembly (warn), reason-string (warn for all require). This enforces basic Solidity security best practices.

Step 10 - .env.example: SEPOLIA_RPC_URL=https://sepolia.infura.io/v3/YOUR_KEY, DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY=0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY (testnet only). ETHERSCAN_API_KEY=optional. .env is git-ignored. Actual .env used in CI via GitHub secrets.
security_constraints: DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY MUST only be a testnet key — NEVER a mainnet key in any config file
deployments/*.json files MUST NOT contain private keys — only addresses and block numbers
Optimizer runs value (200) is appropriate — do not reduce below 200 as it may affect security analysis
Solhint no-inline-assembly rule: inline assembly is PROHIBITED unless explicitly justified with a comment
OpenZeppelin v5.x must be used — do not downgrade to v4 as v4 had known access control vulnerabilities

acceptance_criteria: npx hardhat compile completes with no errors or warnings
npx hardhat test runs against hardhat network and all sample tests pass
contracts/abis/ contains ABI JSON after make export-abis
Solhint reports no errors on contracts/**/*.sol
No private keys or mnemonics in any committed file
